SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: HH_PRMRY_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2010; it will always be null/missing in earlier files. 

Medicare payments are described in detail in a series of Medicare Payment Advisory Commission 
(MedPAC) documents called “Payment Basics”
